summary: Homepage performance improved to 73 (LCP 6.5 s) but remains persistently below the 85 threshold with no structural fix applied; /about is still an empty placeholder with SEO at 83 (below threshold); all other pages are healthy.

top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.5 s, performance score 73, persistently below 85 across many consecutive audits): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold.
issue_title: Homepage performance 73 (LCP 6.5 s) — persistent multi-audit regression; /about still empty placeholder with SEO 83
issue_body:
## Homepage performance remains persistently below 85

The homepage (`/`) scored **73** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-21), with LCP at **6,526 ms** — a +6 pt uptick from yesterday's 67 but still firmly within jitter; no structural fix has been applied and the score has remained below 85 across every recent audit.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 73 | +6 pts (within jitter, still well below 85) |
| LCP | 6,526 ms | +99 ms (minor regression, critically slow) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 182 ms | -25 ms (minor improvement) |

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold. This recommendation has been open across multiple consecutive audits without action.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text "This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. Unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer. This will also resolve the below-threshold SEO score.

---

## Good news — `/projects` and `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` recovered

Both pages improved meaningfully this audit:
- `/projects` jumped from 82 → **92** (LCP improved 816 ms) — now healthy.
- `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue` jumped from 84 → **92** (LCP improved 712 ms) — now healthy.
